{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[buildings]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following onto a relevant building page.

<pre>{{Infobox Build
|name = 
|image = 
|release = 
|update =
|catalogue = 
|collection = 
|description = 
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===name===
The name of the building object.

===image===
An image of the building object.

===release===
The date when the building part was added to the game. Need to add as plain text, no link tags needed.

===update===
The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the building part was released.

===catalogue===
The group the object is in.

===collection===
The subgroup the object is in.

===description===
The description of the object.

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "The name of the building object.",
			"required": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
            "description": "An image of the building object.",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"suggested": true
		},
        "release": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The date when the item was added to the game. Always use alongside with update parameter",
            "suggested": true
        },
        "update": {
			"label": "Released",
            "type": "string",
            "description": "The exact name of the update (without the keyword Update:) in which the item was released. Always use alongside with update parameter",
            "suggested": true
        },
		"catalogue": {
			"label": "Catalogue",
			"description": "The group the object is in.",
			"example": "Flooring",
            "type": "string",
            "suggested": true
		},
		"collection": {
			"label": "Collection",
			"description": "The subgroup the object is in.",
			"example": "Tier 1 Floors",
            "type": "string",
            "suggested": true
		},
		"description": {
			"label": "Description",
			"description": "The description of the object.",
			"example": "Place on the ground to create the foundations for a larger structure.",
			"type": "string",
            "suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a building.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
        "release",
        "update",
		"catalogue",
		"collection",
		"description"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Build]]</includeonly>
